Hasan Balci

Maastricht Centre for Systems Biology

Paul-Henri Spaaklaan 1

6229 EN, Maastricht, The Netherlands

I am a Postdoctoral Researcher at Maastricht Center for Systems Biology (MaCSBio) under the supervision of Martina Summer-Kutmon since January 2023.

My research interests range from developing new techniques for visualization and analysis of graphs to their application in bioinformatics field. At present, my research is primarily focused on leveraging knowledge graphs on drug repurposing for COVID-19 and its long-term effects (long COVID).

Here is my CV.

- Postdoc at i-Vis Research Lab, Bilkent University, 2022 - 2023
- PhD in Computer Engineering, Bilkent University, 2016 - 2022 (thesis)
- MS in Computer Engineering, Bilkent University, 2012 - 2015 (thesis)
- BS in Computer Engineering, Bilkent University, 2007 - 2012

The best way to reach me is by sending an email.
